title: IMet-1 RS Radiosonde

location.value: Israel, Belgium, United States, South Africa

short description: Radiosonde launched on a weather balloon.
description:
This Radiosonde is mostly used in Israel, Belgium, USA as well as South Africa. The IMET range of Radiosonde's are manufactured by Intermet [https://www.intermet.co] www.intermet.co
----
The iMet 54 is the latest product in the Intermet range
----
[[File:iMet-54-rectangle-V1.jpg|400px]]

----
The iMet 4 is a more modern radiosonde, and more compact.
----
[[File:iMet-4_downsized_for_website (1).jpg]]
----
while the iMet 1 is an older model which is almost not used in 2021.
It also has a bit wider bandwidth.
----
